'''''AGWS-03''''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Loronar Corporation/Legends|Loronar Corporation]] [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]].

==History==
At the outset of the [[Battle of Nocto]], both the ''AGWS-03'' and an identical Strike Cruiser designated ''[[AGWS-04]]'' were in line behind the ''[[Sagina]]'' at the ''[[Calenz]]'' [[Telgorn shipyard|shipyard]], the facility where the Rebel Alliance hoped to refit further vessels according to the [[Modified Strike Cruiser]] design pioneered by the [[Peregrine (Strike-class)|''Peregrine'']]. This refit would have seen it modified to carry a pair of [[Gravity well projector/Legends|gravity well projectors]], providing [[Interdictor/Legends|interdiction]] capabilities.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
